chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 7667 of 2022 Date Order with Signature of Judge(s) Priority 1. For hearing on Misc. No.32524/2022. 2. For hearing of main case. 24-03-2025 Mr. Aitezaz Manzoor, advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Fahad Hussain, advocate for respondent. Per learned counsel the petition has become infructuous, hence, may be disposed of. Order accordingly, Judge Judge Ayaz Gul
